ARSG.Keybind.SnatchHint: Press while an opportunity is active to claim it.
ARSG.Keybind.DelegateHint: Press when you have the opportunity to delegate to another player.
ARSG.Keybind.TriggerCountdownHint: Hold to open the countdown picker. While held, press 1-9 (or 0 for 10s) to fire immediately. GM/Assistant only.
ARSG.Keybind.StartCountdownHint: Open the countdown picker for an already-active opportunity.
ARSG.Keybind.QueueCancelHint: While a countdown runs, queue or unqueue the 'Opportunity Lost' outcome.
ARSG.Settings.PromptText.Name: Prompt text
ARSG.Settings.PromptText.Hint: Text shown when an Opportunity is broadcast.
ARSG.Settings.ActsText.Name: 'Acts' text
ARSG.Settings.ActsText.Hint: Seen when a player snatches an opportunity. Use {name} for the player or actor name.
ARSG.Settings.LostText.Name: 'Opportunity Lost' text
ARSG.Settings.LostText.Hint: Text shown briefly when an opportunity is cancelled.
ARSG.Settings.ShowLostText.Name: Show 'Opportunity Lost' text
ARSG.Settings.CancellationQueuedText.Hin: Shown on the banner when the GM has queued a Cancellation during a Countdown.
ARSG.Settings.SnatchButtonText.Name: Snatch button label
ARSG.Settings.SnatchButtonText.Hint: Text on the on-screen Snatch button.
ARSG.Settings.DelegateButtonText.Name: Delegate button label
ARSG.Settings.DelegateButtonText.Hint: Text on the on-screen Delegate button.
ARSG.Settings.AlsoTriedText.Name: 'Also tried' Label
ARSG.Settings.AlsoTriedText.Hint: Prefix for the list of contenders who didn't win the Snatch race.
ARSG.Settings.DelegateDialogTitle.Name: Delegate: Title
ARSG.Settings.DelegateDialogTitle.Hint: Window title for the Delegate dialog.
ARSG.Settings.DelegateDialogPrompt.Name: Delegate: Prompt
ARSG.Settings.FrameColor.Name: Colour
ARSG.Settings.SnatchSound.Name: Trigger SFX
ARSG.Settings.SnatchSound.Hint: Sound played when the opportunity appears.
ARSG.Settings.ActSound.Name: 'Acts' SFX
ARSG.Settings.ActSound.Hint: Sound played when someone snatches the opportunity.
ARSG.Settings.LostSound.Name: Opportunity Lost SFX
ARSG.Settings.LostSound.Hint: Sound played when an Opportunity is Cancelled or Lost.
ARSG.Settings.CountdownTickSound.Name: Countdown tick SFX
ARSG.Settings.CountdownTickSound.Hint: Played each second of the Countdown.
ARSG.Settings.CountdownThreeSound.Name: Countdown '3' SFX
ARSG.Settings.CountdownThreeSound.Hint: Override sound for '3'. Empty = use the tick SFX.
ARSG.Settings.CountdownTwoSound.Name: Countdown '2' SFX
ARSG.Settings.CountdownTwoSound.Hint: Override sound for '2'. Empty = use the tick SFX.
ARSG.Settings.CountdownOneSound.Name: Countdown '1' SFX
ARSG.Settings.CountdownOneSound.Hint: Override sound for '1'. Empty = use the tick SFX.
ARSG.Settings.ShowActorImage.Name: Show Actor image on Snatch
ARSG.Settings.ShowActorImage.Hint: Display a portrait/token next to the 'acts!' text.
ARSG.Settings.ActorImageMode.Name: Actor image source
ARSG.Settings.ActorImageMode.Hint: Where to pull the actor image from.
ARSG.Settings.DefaultActorImage.Name: Default actor image (GM)
ARSG.Settings.DefaultActorImage.Hint: Image used when GM acts or no character is assigned.
ARSG.Settings.NameDisplayMode.Name: Name display
ARSG.Settings.NameDisplayMode.Hint: How to render the snatcher's name in the 'acts!' text.
ARSG.Settings.ShowSceneControl.Name: Show Scene Controls button
ARSG.Settings.ShowSceneControl.Hint: Adds a clapperboard button to the scene controls (LMB = normal Opportunity, RMB = Countdown picker).
ARSG.Settings.CountdownDefaultQueued.Hin: When enabled, every Countdown opportunity starts with the queued Cancellation.
ARSG.Settings.PanToToken.Name: Pan to a token on Snatch
ARSG.Settings.PanToToken.Hint: When a player snatches the opportunity, pan the canvas to their character's token (if one exists on the current scene). Excludes GM-controlled snatches.
ARSG.UI.DelegateDialogPromptDefault: Choose a player to hand the opportunity to.
